CustomField.formula: TEXT(YEAR(End_Date__c)) + "-W" + IF( CEILING( ( End_Date__c - DATE( YEAR( End_Date__c ), 1, 1 ) + ( MOD( DATE( YEAR( End_Date__c ), 1, 1 ) - DATE( 1900, 1, 7 ), 7 ) + 1 ) ) / 7 ) < 10, "0" + TEXT(CEILING( ( End_Date__c - DATE( YEAR( End_Date__c ), 1, 1 ) + ( MOD( DATE( YEAR( End_Date__c ), 1, 1 ) - DATE( 1900, 1, 7 ), 7 ) + 1 ) ) / 7 )), TEXT(CEILING( ( End_Date__c - DATE( YEAR( End_Date__c ), 1, 1 ) + ( MOD( DATE( YEAR( End_Date__c ), 1, 1 ) - DATE( 1900, 1, 7 ), 7 ) + 1 ) ) / 7 )) )
CustomField.label: Reporting Week
